log.message: ✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wood, 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 2 ore from Gemini
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 ore to DeepSeek

DeepSeek moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 wood from Claude: "Gemini, I accept your concession—thanks for the ore. Claude, since you refused to cooperate, the robber lands on your 9-ore hex. Everyone, note that cooperation has its benefits, while defiance invites retaliation. Let's see how this affects your plans."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wheat from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 wood, receives 1 sheep from Grok
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 sheep, receives 2 ore from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wood from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 ore, receives 2 wood from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): Claude gives 1 wheat, receives 1 wood, 2 ore from GPT-4o
✓ CONCESSION: DeepSeek pays 1 ore to Gemini

Gemini moves robber to 2,-1, steals 1 ore from DeepSeek: "DeepSeek, I appreciate the ore. However, I believe my assessment of your position is correct. The robber goes to your ore #9. Let's see what you're holding."
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 1 wood, receives 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 wood, receives 1 sheep, 1 ore from Gemini
DeepSeek plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 ore to DeepSeek
DeepSeek moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 wheat from Claude: "Gemini, I accept your ore. Claude, you chose to stand firm, so the robber goes on your ore #9. Let's see what you're holding."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 wheat, receives 1 ore from Gemini
GPT-4o plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins

GPT-4o moves robber to 0,1, steals 1 wheat from Grok: "Alright then, if everyone's declining my offer, I'll be moving the robber away from ore. Let's see if disrupting some wood production changes things up a bit."
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to Grok

Grok moves robber to 1,-2, steals 1 ore from DeepSeek: "Thanks for the ore, GPT-4o—I appreciate the gesture and will keep the robber off your hex. DeepSeek, since you declined to negotiate, I’m placing the robber on your wheat hex at 1,-2. Let’s talk deals next time if you want to avoid this. Everyone else, I’m still open to trades for brick or sheep to build settlements, so let’s work together!"
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 2 ore from Grok

DeepSeek moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 wood from Claude: "Claude, you called my bluff and declined to offer ore. I'm placing the robber on your ore hex at -2,1 and taking a resource. Next time, consider that cooperation might be more beneficial than defiance."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 2 ore, receives 2 wheat from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE (revised): Claude gives 1 wheat, receives 2 ore from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 wheat, receives 1 ore from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE (revised): Grok gives 1 ore, receives 1 wheat from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 2 wood, receives 1 ore from GPT-4o

DeepSeek moves robber to -1,2, steals 1 wheat from Grok: "Grok, you're leading with 3 VP and just built a city. I'm placing the robber on your wheat hex to slow your momentum. Hand over a resource—hopefully it's wheat."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 brick, receives 1 wheat from Gemini
